title: iluaxs mdp
description: Optimization modpack for 1.21.8, with the mods with beautiful visuals and sounds
body: Iluaxs mdp - a simple and convenient build for Minecraft 1.21.8 - made by myself to beautiful and smooth play. Removed unnecessary brakes, tweaked subloading and raised FPS, but did not sacrifice appearance: light shaders, improved textures and nice small effects. Also added atmospheric sounds and music - the game became livelier. Suitable for medium PC and even for weak machines: put and immediately get high.
